text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day Vodka leaves for overseas is finally here.
However, trying to look cool right before her
departure, she ends up spraining her ankle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet becomes fed up with Vodka when
she learns the trip abroad has fallen through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They have a serious conversation about their
rivalry, and Daiwa Scarlet tells Vodka that seeing
her run in the Japanese Derby lit a fire inside her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to race against Daiwa Scarlet, Vodka
decides to continue racing in Japan. After a few
days of rest, she decides to set her sights on the
Shuka Sho, where her rival awaits.
